title: Brevo vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your needs.
h1: Brevo vs Campaign Monitor: Complete Comparison
intro: Brevo and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Brevo offers an all-in-one CRM suite with multi-channel capabilities and a generous free tier, while Campaign Monitor specializes in beautifully designed emails and multi-brand management for agencies. Choose based on whether you prioritize affordability and feature breadth or design quality and team collaboration.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM, API
comparison_table.tool_b: Template builder, journey designer, smart segments, multi-brand

choose_a_if: You need a free plan with up to 100,000 subscribers
You want multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat) in one platform
You're looking for the most affordable paid option starting at $25/month
choose_b_if: You prioritize beautiful, professionally designed email templates
You manage multiple client brands and need brand-level segmentation
You value journey designer and smart segmentation features

faq.q: Is Brevo better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Brevo is better for most users due to its generous free tier, lower entry price, and broader feature set including SMS and WhatsApp. However, Campaign Monitor may be better if you're an agency that prioritizes design quality and multi-brand management capabilities over cost savings.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper, offering a free plan with up to 100,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at $25/month. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month, making it paid-only. For most businesses, Brevo's free tier alone provides excellent value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support importing subscriber lists and email templates, though the process may require manual setup or data migration. We recommend exporting your contacts and campaigns from Campaign Monitor and importing them into Brevo. Contact support for assistance if you encounter compatibility issues.
